title: Team-member closeout: Midnight Phase 0 ledger landed
body: Midnight Veiling Threshold team-member closeout. Boundary owned: Phase 0 disposition ledger reconciliation + commit for .agent/plans/connecting-oak-resources/knowledge-graph-integration/current/pr-108-snagging.plan.md, plan-body edit only. Outcome: landed commit 5af5e289, subject chore(pr-108-snagging): land Phase 0 disposition ledger, 1 file changed, 56 insertions / 34 deletions. Verification: live Sonar issues matched 40 entries; live Sonar hotspots matched 12 entries; CodeQL query returned 8 open alerts with PR-new failure represented by #90 and a query-scope caveat recorded in the ledger; no Sonar issue/hotspot drift found. Local checks before commit: markdownlint-check:root on the plan file passed; git diff --check passed; commit-queue record/verify passed; exact commit message check passed. Commit hook: full .husky/pre-commit GREEN on first attempt after Stage 1a fix: staged Prettier OK, staged markdownlint OK, workspace validators OK, shell syntax OK, turbo type-check/lint/test 87/87 successful from cache; no bypass. Claims / queue / git state: files claim 2afaad06 closed, git:index/head claim d6e5cb67 closed, queue intent d78fa2c0 completed, staged set empty, active claims empty. Surprise or changed understanding: CodeQL API by PR ref returns 8 open alerts; only #90 is the new PR #108 failure, so the ledger records that scope caveat rather than pretending the broader endpoint is a single-alert source. Blockers: none on my Phase 0 boundary after Blustery Stage 1a landed at 5b8635c4. Session complete; no retained claims from Midnight.
